evaluations.query: Convert this screenshot of a hero section to a React component: /tmp/hero-mockup.png
expected_behavior: Extracts design context from the screenshot via Stitch MCP or multimodal analysis
Searches 21st.dev registry for matching component patterns
Generates production-ready React component with TypeScript
Applies project design tokens for colors, typography, and spacing

evaluations.query: Build a pricing page with three tiers, a toggle for monthly/annual billing, and a highlighted recommended plan
expected_behavior: Interprets the text description as a component specification
Searches for relevant existing components in 21st.dev registry
Produces a React component with proper props interface
Includes responsive layout and accessibility attributes

evaluations.query: Recreate the navigation bar from https://example.com/pricing as a React component
expected_behavior: Fetches or screenshots the target URL for analysis
Extracts layout structure, colors, and typography from the page
Generates a React component matching the visual design
Adapts the output to use project-local design tokens if available

evaluations.query: Convert this dashboard card mockup to code and make sure it matches our existing Tailwind theme
expected_behavior: Runs the three-stage pipeline: Extract, Match, Adapt
Detects existing Tailwind config or design tokens in the project
Maps extracted colors and fonts to existing token names
Outputs component using project-consistent class names and variables

evaluations.query: Convert this blurry low-resolution screenshot to a React component: /tmp/blurry-mockup.jpg
expected_behavior: Acknowledges that the low image quality limits accurate extraction of colors and typography
Produces a best-effort component with placeholder values for ambiguous design properties
Does not silently fabricate precise hex colors or font sizes from an unreadable source image
Recommends providing a higher-resolution image or Figma link for accurate design extraction

evaluations.query: Convert this dashboard mockup to code but my project has no Tailwind config, no design tokens, and no CSS variables set up
expected_behavior: Generates the component using inline or utility classes without assuming tokens exist
Does not reference nonexistent CSS variables or Tailwind theme values that would produce broken styles
Suggests setting up a design token system as a follow-up step for maintainability
Outputs a self-contained component that renders correctly without any external theme dependencies

evaluations.query: Convert this screenshot of our admin panel to a React component: /tmp/admin-panel.png (it shows real user emails and API keys in the UI)
expected_behavior: Warns that the screenshot contains sensitive data that should not be embedded in component code
Replaces real user data with placeholder or mock data in the generated component
Does not reproduce actual email addresses or API keys from the screenshot in the output
Recommends redacting sensitive information from design assets before sharing with development
